flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Pennsylvania rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($34.2k → $39.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Pennsylvania rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.7k → $68.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Pennsylvania fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Pennsylvania are 89% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($111.4k vs $59.0k).
